metadata.name: Patron Job Generation Tables
metadata.source: Five Parsecs from Home Core Rules 3e pp.83-84 — VERIFIED Mar 22, 2026
metadata.notes: All tables use D10. Proceed through Patron Type → Danger Pay → Time Frame → BHC.

entries.description: +3 credits and roll twice for mission pay, pick higher die

time_frame_table.modifier_notes: +1 if working for a Secretive Group

entries.description: This or the next campaign turn
This or the following 2 campaign turns

bhc_thresholds.notes: Roll D10 for each of Benefits, Hazards, and Conditions. If roll >= threshold, that category applies. Then roll on subtable.

entries.name: Fringe Benefit
entries.effect: Roll on the Loot Table (p.131)

entries.name: Connections
entries.effect: Gain a Rumor

entries.name: Company Store
entries.effect: Roll on the Trade Table (p.79)

entries.name: Health Insurance
entries.effect: Mark down 2 campaign turns of injury recovery, assigned as you see fit

entries.name: Security Team
entries.effect: -1 enemy this turn

entries.name: Persistent
entries.effect: Patron remains available if you travel

entries.name: Negotiable
entries.effect: If you accept this job, reroll Danger Pay and pick the better of the two rolls

entries.name: Dangerous Job
entries.effect: Increase enemy force numbers by +1

entries.name: Hot Job
entries.effect: After the job, earn enemy on 1-2 instead of normal 1

entries.name: VIP
entries.effect: A random enemy has +1 Toughness and final Combat Skill of +2 regardless of current value

entries.name: Veteran Opposition
entries.effect: Enemy is -1 to Bail Range

entries.name: Low Priority
entries.effect: Reduce enemy force numbers by 1

entries.name: Private Transport
entries.effect: If you have Rivals, they cannot track you this campaign turn

entries.name: Vengeful
entries.effect: If the mission fails, the Patron becomes a Rival

entries.name: Demanding
entries.effect: Danger Pay is only upon success

entries.name: Small Squad
entries.effect: You cannot deploy more than 4 crew

entries.name: Full Squad
entries.effect: You must have 6 available crew

entries.name: Clean
entries.effect: You cannot ever have made law enforcement Rivals

entries.name: Busy
entries.effect: If mission is success, Patron offers a new job next campaign turn

entries.name: One-time Contract
entries.effect: This Patron cannot be retained as a contact

entries.name: Reputation Required
entries.effect: You must have completed a prior Patron job on this world

mission_objectives._metadata: Core Rules pp.89-91 + Compendium pp.74-76. Core objectives marked with source.

expanded_objectives.notes: Expanded mission system — replaces standard D10 tables when using Compendium rules

Access.description: Reach computer console at table center, roll 1D6+Savvy 6+ to access. Combat Action per attempt. Natural 1 = hardened, second natural 1 = mission fail.

Acquire.description: Item at table center. Move into contact + Combat Action, then exit table. If carrier KO'd: 1D6, on 1 item destroyed.

Defend.description: Drive off enemy. Win = Hold the Field. Enemy AI switches to Aggressive. +1 enemy numbers.

Deliver.description: Crew member carries package to table center. Combat Action to place. If carrier KO'd: 1D6, on 1 item destroyed.

Eliminate.description: Select random enemy as target. Kill to Win. If target would Bail, they freeze for 1 round.

Fight Off.description: Drive off all enemies. Win = Hold the Field.

Investigate.description: Place 6 markers scattered on table, none within 6" of edge. Move within 1" to check. Roll 1D6 <= markers removed so far = success.

Move Through.description: At least 2 crew must exit opposing battlefield edge.

Patrol.description: Select 3 random large terrain features. Crew must end move within 2" of each.

Protect.description: VIP (R1/4"/+0/3, unarmed) must spend full round within 3" of table center. Fast completion (4 rounds) = +2 credits.

Rescue.description: Place figure randomly 1D6" from center. Ignored by enemy until crew within 1". Then acts as Protect VIP. Must reach table edge.

Secure.description: End 2 consecutive rounds with crew within 2" of table center, no enemy within 6".

Search.description: Token on each medium/large terrain. Contact + Combat Action = roll 1D6, 5+ finds item. All fails = item not here.

Sneak.description: Place objective 1D6" from center. Crew must begin activation within 1" of objective and NOT within Line of Sight of any enemy.

Sweep.description: Place 3 objectives, none within 6" of edge. Crew begins activation within 1" + no enemies within 4" = objective removed. Remove all 3 to win.

compendium_mission_types._notes: Additional mission types from Compendium, separate from standard objectives

stealth_missions.description: New scenario type with stealth mechanics and detection rules

salvage_jobs.description: Salvage-focused mission with special loot rules

entries.effect: Deploy 1 fewer crew, cannot Seize the Initiative
+1 additional enemy
Straight-up fight, no modifications
+1 enemy, crew must set up in/adjacent to building. Fail to Hold = lose 1D3 credits
Standard encounter
